problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
